# growthbook_fact_metric (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook fact metric by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique fact metric identifier.

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the fact metric is archived.
- `capping_settings` (Attributes) Controls how outliers are handled. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--capping_settings))
- `datasource` (String) Data source ID.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `denominator` (Attributes) Reference to a fact table column, including aggregation and filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--denominator))
- `description` (String) Fact metric description.
- `display_as_percentage` (Boolean) Whether means display as a percentage.
- `inverse` (Boolean) Whether a decrease is good.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the metric is managed from.
- `max_percent_change` (Number) Maximum significant percent change.
- `metric_auto_slices` (List of String) Slice column names included in metric analysis.
- `metric_type` (String) Metric type.
- `min_percent_change` (Number) Minimum significant percent change.
- `min_sample_size` (Number) Minimum sample size.
- `name` (String) Fact metric name.
- `numerator` (Attributes) Reference to a fact table column, including aggregation and filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--numerator))
- `owner` (String) Owner userId or email address.
- `prior_settings` (Attributes) Controls the bayesian prior. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prior_settings))
- `projects` (List of String) Associated project IDs.
- `quantile_settings` (Attributes) Settings for quantile metrics. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--quantile_settings))
- `regression_adjustment_settings` (Attributes) Controls regression adjustment (CUPED) settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regression_adjustment_settings))
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the fact metric.
- `target_mde` (Number) Target minimum detectable effect.
- `window_settings` (Attributes) Controls the conversion window. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--window_settings))

<a id="nestedatt--capping_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `capping_settings`

Read-Only:

- `ignore_zeros` (Boolean) Ignore zeros when computing a percentile cap.
- `type` (String) Capping type.
- `value` (Number) Absolute value or percentile.


<a id="nestedatt--denominator"></a>
### Nested Schema for `denominator`

Read-Only:

- `aggregate_filter` (String) Comparison applied after aggregation.
- `aggregate_filter_column` (String) Column used to filter users after aggregation.
- `aggregation` (String) User aggregation of the column.
- `column` (String) Column name or special value.
- `fact_table_id` (String) Fact table ID referenced.
- `filters` (List of String) Fact table filter IDs applied to this column.


<a id="nestedatt--numerator"></a>
### Nested Schema for `numerator`

Read-Only:

- `aggregate_filter` (String) Comparison applied after aggregation.
- `aggregate_filter_column` (String) Column used to filter users after aggregation.
- `aggregation` (String) User aggregation of the column.
- `column` (String) Column name or special value.
- `fact_table_id` (String) Fact table ID referenced.
- `filters` (List of String) Fact table filter IDs applied to this column.


<a id="nestedatt--prior_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prior_settings`

Read-Only:

- `mean` (Number) Prior mean.
- `override` (Boolean) Whether org defaults are overridden.
- `proper` (Boolean) Whether a proper prior is used.
- `stddev` (Number) Prior standard deviation.


<a id="nestedatt--quantile_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `quantile_settings`

Read-Only:

- `ignore_zeros` (Boolean) Ignore zero values.
- `quantile` (Number) Quantile value.
- `quantile_event_count_column` (String) Per-row event count column override.
- `type` (String) Quantile over `event` or `unit`.


<a id="nestedatt--regression_adjustment_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regression_adjustment_settings`

Read-Only:

- `days` (Number) Pre-exposure days used.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether regression adjustment is applied.
- `override` (Boolean) Whether org defaults are overridden.


<a id="nestedatt--window_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `window_settings`

Read-Only:

- `delay_unit` (String) Delay unit.
- `delay_value` (Number) Delay after exposure.
- `type` (String) Window type.
- `window_unit` (String) Window unit.
- `window_value` (Number) Window length.
